rules.note: Morning summary with top/bottom 5, market stats, Minervini count
Composite score collapsed below 20 — potential capitulation or serious fundamental issue
Composite score above 75 — strong momentum + fundamentals alignment, research further
RSI below 30 — oversold, potential bounce candidate (buy the dip signal)
RSI above 70 — overbought, consider taking profits or tightening stops
5+ bearish signals firing — multiple red flags, review immediately
Perfect 8/8 Minervini SEPA template — stock in ideal uptrend stage 2 setup
7/8 Minervini checks — near-perfect trend template, watch for full confirmation
Multi-year uptrend stock 5%+ below resistance — potential buy opportunity on pullback
Multi-year uptrend stock 10%+ below resistance — potential buy opportunity on pullback
Multi-year uptrend stock 15%+ below resistance — significant discount on proven performer
Multi-year uptrend stock 20%+ below resistance — deep pullback, high conviction buy zone
